SYNTHETIC TEST FIXTURE — NOT AN OFFICIAL GOVERNMENT REPORT
Report compiled by Manitoba Agriculture
Crop Report – July 14, 2026
Commodity Reports
Regional Comments
Southwest
Spring cereals are at a range of stages and generally good.
Northwest
Canola is developing.
Central
Peas are flowering.
Eastern
Wheat is at anthesis.
Interlake
Crop condition ranges from good to excellent in some locations.
